data.content: Implementation blocked on knots-c8f4. Current main still lacks the canonical ArtifactTarget/output target vocabulary; knots-c8f4 is at ready_for_plan_review, and the working tree still uses legacy target strings such as remote_main and pr. Resume 95c0 after c8f4 lands, then update the Loom prompt param enums and conditional sections for branch, merged_main, and live_deployment with matching coverage tests.
